Comfortable Accommodations: Surya Hotel & Cottages Prigen in Tretes offers adults-only rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes a balcony, minibar, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a swimming pool with a view, sauna, fitness centre, and a lush garden. Additional amenities include a kids' pool, playground, and free on-site private parking.
Dining Experience: The modern restaurant serves international cuisine with halal options. A bar and coffee shop provide relaxing spaces for guests.
Prime Location: Located 41 km from Abdul Rachman Saleh Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Araya Golf & Family Club (41 km) and Museum Mpu Purwa (42 km).
